fn collect_filtered(items: &[u64]) -> Vec<u64> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    for item in items {
        if *item > 10 {
            result.push(*item);
        }
    }
    result
}

fn collect_with_transform(items: &[&str]) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    for item in items {
        result.push(item.to_uppercase());
    }
    result
}

fn build_matrix(rows: usize, cols: usize) -> Vec<Vec<i32>> {
    let mut matrix = Vec::new();
    for i in 0..rows {
        let mut row = Vec::new();
        for j in 0..cols {
            row.push((i * cols + j) as i32);
        }
        matrix.push(row);
    }
    matrix
}

fn collect_pairs(keys: &[String], values: &[String]) -> Vec<(String, String)> {
    let mut pairs = Vec::new();
    for (k, v) in keys.iter().zip(values.iter()) {
        pairs.push((k.clone(), v.clone()));
    }
    pairs
}
